task_completion.description: Log in to Canvas as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Canvas dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile, admin settings, or course dashboard visible).

task_completion.description: Set the appointment group title to 'Oral Proficiency Exams'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Canvas Scheduler appointment group creation/edit form, the 'Name' field contains exactly 'Oral Proficiency Exams'.

task_completion.description: Select the SPAN101 course for the appointment group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Calendars' or 'Select Calendars' section shows 'SPAN101' or 'Elementary Spanish I' checked/selected.
The 'Location' field in the appointment group form contains exactly 'Language Lab 101'.

task_completion.description: Configure the date, time range, and 15-minute slot duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date is set to exactly 7 days from the current system date (verifiable via system clock). The time range is set from 14:00 to 16:00 (or 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM). The time slots are divided into 15-minute increments.

task_completion.description: Limit each time slot to 1 user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Limit each time slot to X users' checkbox is checked and the value is set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Save and publish the appointment group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save & Publish' and the final screen shows the appointment group successfully created and published in the Canvas Scheduler list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Canvas web GUI to create the appointment group.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Canvas LMS interface, not terminal windows executing API commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely filled out the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the form being progressively filled out (typing text, selecting dropdowns, clicking checkboxes).

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task is performed within the actual Canvas LMS application, not by typing the expected values into a text editor or note-taking app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Canvas LMS appointment group with the following exact values: Title: 'Oral Proficiency Exams', Location: 'Language Lab 101', Duration: 15 minutes per slot, Limit: 1 user per slot, Course: 'SPAN101' (Elementary Spanish I). The date must be exactly 7 days from the system's current date, and the time range must be 14:00 to 16:00 (2:00 PM to 4:00 PM).
